description: Learn the essential skills of grilling food safely and effectively.

steps.instruction: Gather your ingredients and tools: a grill, charcoal or gas, and food to grill.
Demonstrate how to prepare the grill for cooking, including lighting and preheating.
Show the proper technique for placing food on the grill and managing heat levels.
Monitor the grilling process, flipping the food as necessary to ensure even cooking.
Remove the food from the grill and let it rest before serving.

safety_tips: Always supervise the grill while in use.
Use long-handled tools to avoid burns.
Keep a fire extinguisher nearby when grilling.
